title: StickAspects
description: This is a resource pack made of Vanilla Tweak textures and some of my own.
body:
# ❓About

This is a resource pack made of Vanilla Tweaks textures and some of my own. It is a simple texture pack that you can use while playing Minecraft. Some tweaks include smoother wool and stone types, better death messages, Technoblade pig, helmet texture fix, dark gui and custom hotbar, brighter nether, new grass block, mycelium, dirt path, and podzol side textures, better enchantment glint, deepslate brick options background, deepslate tile menu buttons, and more!

##  📌Credits 
#### [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)

## ❗Disclaimer
GUI tweaks like the custom hotbar, custome crosshair, deepslate brick options background, and deepslate tile menu buttons were made by me. The custom lang which includes the death messages was also made by me. Tweaks like the Technoblade pig, dark gui, and grass block, dirt path, mycelium, and podzol side textures were originally made by me, but Vanilla Tweaks had the same/better versions of those textures, so I used their textures. Block models and the rest of the textures were made by Vanilla Tweaks.
